generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people support strategic autonomy, but have we really thought this through? Our allies have been protecting us for decades - why risk destabilizing that? And let's be honest, our preparedness isn't exactly where it needs to be. Maybe we should focus on strengthening what we have before making big changes. #NationalSecurity #AllianceBurdenSharing
